conservative.name: Greater Healing
conservative.requirements: 8 favour. Engaged with target. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The target recovers normal wounds equal to your Willpower
The target recovers normal wounds equal to your Willpower +1
The target recovers normal wounds equal to your Willpower +2

boon.description: Turn 1 of your target's critical wounds with a severity no greater than your Willpower facedown

sigmarsComet.description: The target immediately recovers normal wounds equal to your Fellowship

delay.description: The healing does not apply until the end of the round in which this blessing is resolved. If the target is killed in the interim, the blessing is wasted. This is in addition to the regular effects

reckless.name: Greater Healing
reckless.requirements: 8 favour. Engaged with target. If you are engaged with an enemy add L to your dice pool

success.description: The target recovers normal wounds equal to your Willpower +1
The target recovers normal wounds equal to your Willpower +2
The target recovers normal wounds equal to your Willpower +3

boon.description: This blessing affects a second target in the same engagement

sigmarsComet.description: The target immediately recovers normal wounds equal to your Fellowship

exertion.description: You suffer 1 wound, in addition to the regular effects
